meta.title: Korobkov Art Studio
meta.description: Contemporary Ukrainian art studio. Original paintings, murals, and installations by Mykhailo Korobkov & Olha Korobkova.

series.podilia_desc: Ancient ornaments of traditional Podil carpets intertwined with the human figure. History meets modernity.
series.destruction_desc: Every event of our lives leaves its imprint. With the war, the negative imprints became much more abundant.

about.title: About
about.artist_subtitle: Mykhailo Korobkov & Olha Korobkova. Painting, murals, installations.
about.bio: Korobkov Art Studio is a creative collaboration between artists Mykhailo Korobkov and Olha Korobkova, based in Valencia, Spain. Working across painting, murals, and installations, the duo explores themes of cultural transition, identity, and the interplay between tradition and modernity.
about.statement_1: Our artistic practice is shaped in the space between personal and collective experience, between memory and the present moment, between roots and movement. As an artistic duo, we explore the transformations that occur within a person during the process of changing environments: relocation, adaptation, entering a new culture, and the collision of the familiar with the unknown.
about.statement_2: The central theme of our work is the experience of cultural shock — not as a traumatic event, but as a state of transition in which the perception of space, body, and identity shifts. We are interested in the moment when past experience is still present, while new experience is only beginning to form.
about.statement_3: In painting, we combine figuration and abstraction, allowing them to coexist just as emotions, fragments of events, and sensations coexist in memory. The painterly gesture, rhythm, and multilayered structure become a way of capturing not a narrative, but a state — the process of internally 'translating' a new cultural landscape.
about.statement_4: Ornament and repeating modules are an important part of our visual language. They function as an internal code that connects traditional decorative motifs linked to cultural memory with the rhythms of contemporary digital patterns. Through repetition and structure, we speak about heritage, memory, and the interweaving of personal and collective histories.
about.statement_5: It is important for us to work with scale and space in a way that makes the viewer's body part of the experience. Painting, large formats, and spatial solutions are opportunities to create environments where emotional and visual experience merge.
about.statement_6: We believe in art as a space for dialogue — between cultures, languages, and experiences. Our works do not provide answers, but offer a state in which the viewer can recognize their own experience of change, movement, loss, and the search for home.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: Collaborate with Korobkov Art Studio
partners.why_text: Korobkov Art Studio brings a unique voice in contemporary Ukrainian art — blending ancient Podil carpet ornaments with modern techniques, creating works that bridge history and present day. Our art has been exhibited in London, Krakow, Cordoba, Wroclaw, Istanbul, and Valencia.
partners.type_gallery_desc: Host a solo or group exhibition featuring our paintings, murals, and installations.
partners.type_mural_desc: Commission a large-scale mural for your space — public, commercial, or private.
partners.type_curatorial_desc: Include our works in curatorial projects exploring Ukrainian contemporary art, identity, and war.
partners.type_corporate_desc: Acquire original artworks for corporate collections and office spaces.
